name: karvyloop-console-frontend
description: KarvyLoop console front-end — incremental TypeScript + Vite migration of static/ (dev-report #4). Build output goes to ../static (served as-is by the FastAPI console). No runtime framework — vanilla TS, 少脚手架.

scripts.smoke: node scripts/dom_smoke.mjs && node scripts/modal_smoke.mjs && node scripts/ui_widgets_smoke.mjs && node scripts/files_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/schedules_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/diagnose_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/atoms_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/roles_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/domains_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/agents_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/skills_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/memory_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/models_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/decision_prefs_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/tokens_panel_smoke.mjs && node scripts/render_smoke.mjs && node scripts/i18n_smoke.mjs && node scripts/workflow_canvas_smoke.mjs
scripts.verify: tsc --noEmit && node scripts/build.mjs && npm run smoke
